title: Change Permissions Using API
excerpt:
Is there a way using the API to change the permissions on a column within a board? 
I want to create a new column and set its permissions using the API

posts.author: JT001 (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way using the API to change the permissions on a column within a board?

I want to create a new column and set its permissions using the API

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JT001

Currently monday.com’s API does not allow you to interact with permissions on neither a board or a column level.

Although I can certainly see how this would be useful, and I’ve since passed your feedback along to the team

posts.author: daniel-ma-tic (Daniel s)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any news in that matter?

posts.author: brentezerc (Brent Rager)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be incredibly useful. Would also like to check in on its existence.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: @brentezerc @daniel-ma-tic – no news yet. Please vote for this feature at the top of the page, if you haven’t already!

posts.author: Hamza_irshad (Hamza)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi is there any update on it ? is it possible using graph api?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Hamza_irshad,

Welcome to the community! I hope you like it here

There is no way of doing this via API as of today.

I will add your vote towards this request!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: Stan (Stan van Weringh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Is this already made? We really need it for our company that makes boards by the API. Some things should be restricted!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Stan,

Matias here!

This has not been implemented. We do not have an ETA yet but we will announce if that changes!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Cachapa360 (Rodrigo Campos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias,
Could you let us know if this feature is at the top of your priorities, or is it in the lower level of priorities?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Cachapa360,

I wish I could share that information but the information I can share right now is that we do not have an ETA on it. So I would not count on it being implemented in the nearest future.

Cheers,
Matias
